description_long: This is a dark blue, rectangular trash bin with a slightly slanted front face and an open-top design, allowing easy disposal of waste. The bin features subtle decorative patterns in a lighter blue shade along the lower edges, adding a touch of elegance to its otherwise utilitarian form. The top surface is flat and extends slightly beyond the main body, creating a small overhang. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for collecting general waste in urban environments. The sides are plain except for the decorative motifs, and there are no visible handles or wheels. The overall construction appears to be sturdy, likely made from metal or heavy-duty plastic.
description: A dark blue, open-top trash bin with decorative lower-edge patterns and a flat overhanging lid, designed for urban waste collection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open-top entry and decorative patterns along the bottom edge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the slanted front face and plain side with subtle decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, undecorated back with matching lower-edge patterns.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the slanted front and plain side.
